## How it was verified

- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build` green
- [ ] Pure logic: tests written first (or n/a — visual change)
- [ ] Visuals: checked live and/or in `?sim` — describe what you looked at
- [ ] For presets: `presets.lint.test.ts` passes and it survives a few minutes of actual playing
